items.title: S01E01 - Table Manners
items.summary: A dysfunctional family gathering for the weekend reunites three siblings and significant others in a small country cottage with farcical consequences.

infolabels.title: Table Manners
infolabels.plot: A dysfunctional family gathering for the weekend reunites three siblings and significant others in a small country cottage with farcical consequences.

items.title: S01E02 - Living Together
items.summary: A dysfunctional family gets together at the house of their cantankerous mother and old resentments, jealousies, and rivalries are reignited.

infolabels.title: Living Together
infolabels.plot: A dysfunctional family gets together at the house of their cantankerous mother and old resentments, jealousies, and rivalries are reignited.

items.title: S01E03 - Round and Round the Garden
items.summary: Annie has second thoughts about spending the weekend with brother-in-law Norman as the dysfunctional family tries to come to terms with itself.

infolabels.title: Round and Round the Garden
infolabels.plot: Annie has second thoughts about spending the weekend with brother-in-law Norman as the dysfunctional family tries to come to terms with itself.
